data.name: 奮鬥吧！播種牧場
data.detailed_description:
居住於城市的你，因為厭煩了循規蹈矩日日繁忙的社畜生活，

選擇來到鄉村過上恬靜的慢生活。

當聽說某個村子的農場正在出售的消息後，

你選擇買下這裏，開始自己的第二人生。

然而這個村子的村長向你提出了一個令人意想不到的請求……

「能否請你和村子裏的年輕女性們生孩子呢？」

本遊戲為農場生活模擬遊戲。

玩家將操縱主角，

通過在牧場裏種植蔬菜飼養家畜，來發展農場規模。

同時，在工作閒暇之餘，積極地和村子裏的各位女性發展關係吧。

當關係進展到一定程度時，一起啪啪啪生個孩子自然也水到渠成。

  • 慢生活遊戲

  • 農場生活模擬（釣魚，種田，★播種）

  • 16名可攻略角色 + 全員複數福利

data.short_description: 本遊戲為農場生活模擬遊戲。居住於城市的你，因為厭煩了循規蹈矩日日繁忙的社畜生活， 選擇來到鄉村買下農場過上恬靜的慢生活。然而這個村子的村長向你提出了一個令人意想不到的請求…… 「能否請你和村子裏的年輕女性們生孩子呢？」
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Let's Go! My Harem Farm
data.detailed_description:
You are a young man living in the city. Every day, you were busy with work, leading a hectic life.

Tired of such a lifestyle, you began to yearn for a slow life in a place rich in nature. At that time, you heard that a ranch in a certain rural village was being sold cheaply, so you decided to buy the ranch to start a second life.

However, the village chief you met seems to have a favor to ask of you...?

"Could you possibly have children with the young women in the village?"

This game is a farm life simulation game.

Players will control this young man, growing vegetables, raising livestock, and after work, go out to the village to get along with the women.

As you get closer, events that deepen the relationship occur, and eventually, they may wish to have your children.

  • Slow Life

  • Farm Life Simulation

  • 16 Romanceable Characters

Minimum:

  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

Recommended:

  • Processor: 3+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
